---
title: "Descriptives"
author: "John Curtin"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 2
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  version: "v4"
---
```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_in <- format_path(str_c("llmpanel/chtc/train_", params$version, "/input"))
theme_set(theme_classic()) 
```

```{r}
# using data_trn for now.  Need to get a clean version of panel_long.csv somewhere
d <- read_csv(here::here(path_in, "data_trn.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  glimpse()
```

```{r}
likert_num <- 1:7
likert_txt <- c("strongly_disagree", "disagree", "somewhat_disagree",
               "neutral", "somewhat_agree", "agree", "strongly_agree")

d <- d |> 
  mutate(message_rating_num = recode_values(message_rating,
                                            from = likert_txt,
                                            to = likert_num),
         message_rating = factor(message_rating,
                                 levels = likert_txt))
```

General descriptives for message_rating_num
```{r}
d |> 
  select(message_rating_num) |> 
  skimr::skim_without_charts()
```


MAE for mean only model
```{r}
sum(abs(d$message_rating_num - mean(d$message_rating_num))) / nrow(d)
```

Histogram
```{r}
d |>
  ggplot(aes(x = message_rating)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(angle = 30)) +
  labs(x = "Message Rating", y = "Count", title = "Distribution of Message Ratings")
```

Bar plots for mean message rating by tone and style
```{r}
d |>
  summarise(mean_rating = mean(message_rating_num), .by = tone) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = tone, y = mean_rating)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(x = "Tone", y = "Mean Message Rating", title = "Mean Message Rating by Tone") + 
  ylim(0,7)
```

```{r}
d |>
  summarise(mean_rating = mean(message_rating_num), .by = style) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = style, y = mean_rating)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(x = "Mean Message Rating", y = "Style", title = "Mean Message Rating by Style") +
  ylim(0,7)
```

```{r}
d |>
  summarise(mean_rating = mean(message_rating_num), .by = c(tone, style)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = tone, y = mean_rating, fill = style)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Tone", y = "Mean Message Rating", fill = "Style",
       title = "Mean Message Rating by Tone and Style") +
  ylim(0, 7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```
